item.name: Demi-Phoinix Horn
item.description: This grim horn produces an unbridled sound that calls forth your Demi-Phoinix.

mount.name: Demi-Phoinix
mount.action: Summon forth Demi-Phoinix. Because four wings are better than two and three heads better than one.
mount.description: This entity is a recreation of the being found imprisoned inside Pandæmonium. The original was the fruit of the ancients' research into immortal birds, but owing to its volatility, it was branded a failure.
mount.tooltip:
How do you spell that again?
- An Ancient
